svg.title: SlimZero Ralph and GSD agent loop diagram
svg.desc: Structural and flowchart diagram showing how the Ralph observe-plan-act loop integrates with GSD task graph and SlimZero circuit breakers

g.text: Ralph + GSD agent loop — with SlimZero fault control

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does GSD decompose a goal into sub-tasks?')
g.text: 1 LLM call · JSON task graph · validate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the GSD task graph checkpoint work?')

g.text: SlimZero compresses every LLM call inside this loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Ralph observe step do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ralph plan step do and how does SlimZero compress it?')
sendPrompt('How does the tool validator work before an action executes?')
sendPrompt('What does the Ralph reflect step check?')
sendPrompt('How does the semantic drift detector work in SlimZero?')
sendPrompt('How does GSD mark a task as done and move to the next?')

g.text: Circuit breakers — any triggers halt the loop

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when the max steps circuit breaker fires?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the retry budget circuit breaker fires?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the token budget circuit breaker fires?')
sendPrompt('What does HumanEscalation mean and how does the developer handle it?')
